pageHeader.label: Case Studies
pageHeader.title: Proven Results in Critical Environments
pageHeader.description: Explore our portfolio of successful rehabilitations across healthcare and commercial facilities.

studies.title: Regional Medical Center Main Line Restoration
studies.description: Complete rehabilitation of a cast iron main sewer line running beneath the emergency department. Zero excavation required, zero downtime for critical care units.

detail.heroSummary: A complete rehabilitation of a cast iron main sewer line running directly beneath the emergency department, executed with zero downtime.
detail.challenge: A critical cast iron sewer line running directly beneath the hospital's emergency department was actively failing. Traditional excavation would have required tearing open the foundation, relocating critical care patients, and shutting down the trauma center for weeks. The facility needed a structural solution that guaranteed zero operational downtime and absolute infection control.

items.title: Zero Demolition
items.description: No excavation beneath the emergency department.

items.title: Continuous Operation
items.description: Patients and staff remained fully undisturbed.

items.title: 48-Hour Turnaround
items.description: Permanent rehabilitation completed in two days.

items.title: 100% Sterile
items.description: Process remained fully contained and safe.

testimonial.quote: The ability to restore this critical line without shutting down the ER was remarkable for our operations.
testimonial.author: Director of Facilities

detail.ctaDescription: Discover how our trenchless solutions can protect your critical infrastructure without disruption.

studies.title: Veterans Affairs Hospital Vertical Stacks
studies.description: Structural lining of vertical sanitary stacks spanning multiple floors. Completed in phases to ensure continuous operation of patient wards.

detail.heroSummary: Structural lining of vertical sanitary stacks spanning multiple floors, completed in phases to maintain continuous patient ward operations.
detail.challenge: Eight vertical sanitary stacks spanning ten floors were showing severe corrosion and joint failure. The hospital could not shut down entire floors for traditional pipe replacement. Patient wards needed to remain fully operational throughout the rehabilitation, and the work had to be phased to avoid disrupting sensitive medical equipment on adjacent floors.

traditional.label: Floor closures
traditional.description: Shut down wards for weeks per stack

traditional.label: Wall demolition
traditional.description: Open walls on every affected floor

items.title: Floor-by-Floor Phasing
items.description: Each stack lined independently without affecting others.

items.title: No Wall Demolition
items.description: Access achieved through existing cleanouts and connections.

items.title: Ward Continuity
items.description: Patient wards remained open and operational throughout.

items.title: Structural Integrity
items.description: New liner restores full structural capacity for 50+ years.

detail.ctaDescription: See how our phased approach keeps your facility running while we restore your infrastructure.

studies.title: University Research Lab Acid Waste System
studies.description: Specialized epoxy coating applied to deteriorating acid waste lines. The new lining provides superior chemical resistance for the research facility.

detail.heroSummary: Specialized epoxy coating for deteriorating acid waste lines, delivering superior chemical resistance compared to the original glass piping.
detail.challenge: The university's chemistry and biology research labs relied on aging glass acid waste lines that were cracking and leaking corrosive chemicals. Standard CIPP liners cannot withstand the chemical exposure. The facility needed a solution rated for high-temperature acid waste that could be installed without disrupting active research programs or requiring hazardous material evacuation.

traditional.label: Full excavation
traditional.description: Dig up and replace all glass piping

traditional.label: Limited materials
traditional.description: Standard liners fail under acid exposure

items.title: Chemical Resistant
items.description: Custom resin formulated for acid and solvent exposure.

items.title: High-Temp Rated
items.description: Withstands elevated temperatures from lab waste streams.

items.title: Labs Stayed Open
items.description: Installation completed during off-hours with zero disruption.

items.title: Exceeds Original Spec
items.description: New lining outperforms the original glass piping.

testimonial.quote: The custom formulation exceeded our expectations. Our labs never missed a day of operation.
testimonial.author: Facilities Director

detail.ctaDescription: We engineer custom solutions for unique pipe rehabilitation problems.
